content.text:
Done! The PR is live at **https://github.com/vercel-labs/agent-browser/pull/704**

Here's what was fixed:

- **`connectViaCDP`** (line 1562) — the `--cdp` flag path — was hardcoding `context.setDefaultTimeout(10000)` instead of using `getDefaultTimeout()`
- **`connectToBrowserbase`** (line 957) — had the same hardcoded timeout issue
- Both now use `getDefaultTimeout()`, which respects the `AGENT_BROWSER_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT` env var consistently across all connection modes
- The recording context (line 2346) intentionally keeps its fixed 10s timeout since it's a temporary video recording context

Build and typecheck pass clean. The `getDefaultTimeout` unit tests all pass. The only test failures are pre-existing (missing Playwright browser binary in this environment).
